# SCORE Job Analysis Worksheet

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Worksheet for defining jobs, tasks, skills, and hiring needs.

## When to surface

The user asks about hiring, job roles, team capacity, or delegation.

## Guardrails
